productDisplayName: Puma Men Eco ortholite Green Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the laidback urban male, this puma Eco Ortholite shoe raises the bar for stylish casual footwear. The simple design and durable construction goes well with all outfits. Wear it with distressed denims that have foldover hems to look your stylish best.UpperCanvas upper with stitch detailingSnipped edges for styleLacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue with brand badgeCheck patterned sockliner fit along the media of the footMidsolePhylon midsole with PU foxingOutsoleTPU outsole with herringbone grooves for grip and traction
